name: Magic Initiate
description: You received formal training in the arcane arts, though circumstances prevented you from completing your studies.

feats.name: Spellcasting
feats.description:
You gain access to **limited spell casting** using **Mana** if you do not already have a **Spellcasting** feat. Gain access to actions and spells that require spell casting. Your spellcasting features are as follows:
- You are a **Limited-caster**.
- Your **source** is **Mana**.
- Your **Spellcasting Modifier** is **Mind**.
- Your total **reservoir** equals _(½ × Tier) + Spellcasting Modifier_ (rounded up).
- Start with Two **Known Spells** at Tier 1.
- Your **prepared spells** equal your **Spellcasting Modifier**.
- Your **Spell DC** = 10 + Spell Tier + Spellcasting Modifier.
- Each **Respite** restores spell points equal to your **Spellcasting Modifier** (minimum 3).
- You gain two **Cantrips** from the **Magic Initiate** list.

feats.name: Sphere Access
feats.description: You gain access to one **Sphere of Magic** that you do not already have. You gain one additional **Spell** that does not count against your current **Known Spells**

feats.name: Reckless Casting
feats.description: You care not for safety and need your spells to active regardless. Once per **Long Rest**, you spend **Ambition** equal to three times the tier of a **Spell**.

feats.name: Chaos Magic
feats.description:
Your spellcasting grows unstable. You gain additional **2 Reservoir**.  
Whenever you cast a **spell of Tier 1** or **higher**, roll a **Chaos Die** (starting at d12).  
- On a roll of 1, activate the **Chaos Table**.  
- On any other result, degrade the **Chaos Die** one step (d12 → d10 → d8 → d6 → d4).  

After triggering the **Chaos Table**, the **Chaos Die** resets to d12.

**Chaos Table**

| d12    | Chaos Effect                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| ------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **1**  | **Backfire** The spell fizzles. You take **1d4 arcane damage** and the spell has no effect.                                                                                                                                             |
| **2**  | **Spell Ricochet** The spell re-targets a random nearby creature. Costs no AP but still consumes resources. Roll a d6 **even numbers** target an enemy of choice, **odd numbers** target an ally of choice.                             |
| **3**  | **Ethereal Flicker** You partially phase out. Gain **Dodge** but suffer **–2 to Spell Attacks** until the start of your next turn.                                                                                                      |
| **4**  | **Chaos Pulse:** All creatures within **Close** range take 1d4 **arcane** damage.                                                                                                                                                       |
| **5**  | **Sideways Spells** For your next two turns, you gain **+1 Spell DC** but suffer **–1 Spell Attack**.                                                                                                                                   |
| **6**  | **Mind Spark** Your head emits flickering light, acting as a **torch**. Gain **+1 Mind Defense** for 1 round, and light for 1 hour.                                                                                                     |
| **7**  | **Twisted Intent** Your spell’s effect warps. It gains **1d12 damage** or 1d6 added to **Spell Attack**, but you gain **Weakened 1** and 1 **Wound**.                                                                                   |
| **8**  | **Spectral Hands** Ghostly hands manifest. You may immediately take a free **Assist** or and additional **Interact** action.                                                                                                            |
| **9**  | **Reservoir Overflow** You regain **1 Ambition or 1 Reservoir** (your choice; cannot exceed max).                                                                                                                                       |
| **10** | **Crackling Chaos** Residual energy crackles. Your next spell gains **Resolve** on its **Spell Attack**, but causes a loud noise that can be heard from 1 mile away.                                                                    |
| **11** | **Slipstream** A distortion in reality opens, You swap places with one chosen target within **Close** range. When you re-appear everyone with **touch** (including yourself) takes 1d4 **Arcane** damage.                               |
| **12** | **Reality Bends:** Colors invert, sounds distort, gravity ripples. For the next 10 minutes you have **Strain** on **Skill Checks** related to **Awareness** and **Intution**, but **Resolve** on **Vigor**, **Talent**, and **Social**. |
